user.title: SHYS Remote
user.description:
This integration stores learned remote signals and reacts to incoming signals through infrared receivers and transmitters.

After setup, add devices under the integration and learn signals for each device. Output signals are sent via buttons, input signals trigger binary sensors.

init.title: SHYS Remote options
init.description: Global settings for all devices and input signals.

data_description.pulse_ms: How long an input binary sensor stays on after a matching signal was received.
data_description.match_tolerance: Allowed timing deviation when matching received signals against learned input patterns.
data_description.debounce_ms: Minimum time between two triggers of the same input signal.

user.title: Add device
user.description: Create a device and select the infrared receiver and transmitter.

data_description.device_name: Name of the logical device in Home Assistant, for example TV or receiver.
data_description.receiver_entity_id: Infrared receiver used for learning and for input signals.
data_description.transmitter_entity_id: Infrared transmitter used to send output signals.
data_description.signal_source: Learn signals manually later or import buttons from the bundled Flipper-IRDB during setup.

irdb_search.title: Search IR database
irdb_search.description:
Search the bundled Flipper-IRDB for your device. Use brand, model or device type.

IR data from {attribution}, licensed under {license}.

data_description.irdb_query: Example: Samsung TV, Sony soundbar or BN59.
data_description.irdb_category: Optional filter to narrow results, for example TVs only.

data_description.irdb_remote: Choose a remote to import. You choose the signal direction in the next step. Use the page entries when there are many results.

irdb_confirm.title: Confirm import
irdb_confirm.description:
Import {count} signals from {remote}. {skipped} unsupported signals will be skipped.

Source: {attribution} ({license}).

data_description.direction: Output creates send buttons. Input creates binary sensors. Both creates a button and binary sensor for each signal.

reconfigure.title: Manage {device}
reconfigure.description: Choose what you want to do for this device.

edit_device.title: Edit device
edit_device.description: Change the name or infrared hardware for {device}.

data_description.device_name: Display name of this device in Home Assistant.
data_description.receiver_entity_id: Infrared receiver used for learning and for input signals.
data_description.transmitter_entity_id: Infrared transmitter used to send output signals.

learn_command.title: Learn signal
learn_command.description:
Enter a name and direction for the signal, submit the form, then press the button on the remote for {device} within the timeout.

Receiver used for learning: {receiver}

data_description.name: Unique name for this signal on the device, for example power or volume_up.
data_description.direction: Output creates a send button. Input creates a binary sensor. Both creates a button and binary sensor at once.
data_description.timeout: How long Home Assistant waits for the next signal after you submit this form.

delete_command.title: Delete signal
delete_command.description: Select a stored signal on {device} to remove.

data_description.name: The signal and its button or binary sensor will be removed.

delete_command_empty.title: No signals stored
delete_command_empty.description: There are no learned signals on {device} yet. Use "Learn signal" first.

error.invalid_signal_name: Please enter a valid signal name (letters, numbers, underscore).
error.invalid_receiver: The selected entity is not a valid infrared receiver.
error.invalid_emitter: The selected entity is not a valid infrared transmitter.
error.device_already_exists: A device with this name already exists.
error.command_already_exists: This signal already exists on the device.
error.learn_timeout: No signal was received in time.
error.empty_signal: The received signal did not contain timings.
error.not_loaded: SHYS Remote is not loaded. Please restart Home Assistant.
error.irdb_query_too_short: Please enter at least 2 characters to search.
error.irdb_no_results: No remotes were found for this search.
error.irdb_index_failed: The bundled IR database could not be loaded.
error.irdb_download_failed: The selected remote could not be downloaded.
error.irdb_remote_not_found: The selected remote is no longer available.
error.irdb_no_supported_signals: The selected remote does not contain supported signals.
error.irdb_import_failed: The device could not be created. Check the Home Assistant log.

abort.no_commands: No signals are stored for this device yet.
abort.already_configured: A device with this name already exists.

learn.name: Learn signal
learn.description: Waits for the next remote signal and stores it on the selected device.

device.name: Device
device.description: Device slug from the integration settings, for example soundbar_buro.

name.name: Signal name
name.description: Unique signal name within the device.

direction.name: Direction
direction.description: Output signals can be sent later, input signals trigger a binary sensor. Both creates a button and binary sensor.

receiver_entity_id.name: Receiver
receiver_entity_id.description: Optional override for the device's default infrared receiver.

transmitter_entity_id.name: Transmitter
transmitter_entity_id.description: Optional override for the device's default infrared transmitter.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for a signal.

send.name: Send signal
send.description: Sends a previously learned output signal.

device.name: Device
device.description: Device slug from the integration settings.

name.name: Signal name
name.description: Name of the learned output signal.

delete.name: Delete signal
delete.description: Deletes a learned signal and removes its entity.

device.name: Device
device.description: Device slug from the integration settings.

command_not_found.message: Signal '{name}' was not found on device '{device}'.

empty_signal.message: The received signal did not contain timings.

invalid_receiver.message: Entity '{entity_id}' is not an infrared receiver.

invalid_emitter.message: Entity '{entity_id}' is not an infrared transmitter.

signal_not_output.message: Signal '{name}' on device '{device}' is configured for input and cannot be sent.

irdb_index_failed.message: The Flipper-IRDB index could not be loaded ({status}).
